title: Injecting data into static fields is not supported by Spring
description: Spring's dependency injection does not support injecting values into static fields. Attempting to do so can lead to unexpected behavior and should be avoided. Use instance fields for dependency injection instead.
recommendation: Refactor code to avoid injecting dependencies into static fields. Use instance fields and constructor or setter injection.
impact: Code that relies on static field injection may not work as expected, leading to bugs and maintainability issues.

checks.message: Spring does not support dependency injection into static fields. Use instance fields or initialization methods.
